case_title: BRIDCHETTE JOHNSON VS. HARRY BEHARRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY AWARENESS & TREATMENT SERVICES, INC.
